3294110.name: Tempo Tamer
3294110.description:
Tempo Tamer is a fusion of monster battling and rhythm game mechanics! Train and collect musical creatures, known as Beatures, and put your sense of rhythm to the test in musical battles where every attack depends on your timing.

Rhythm-Based Combat

Select a series of attacks and your Beature will perform them while you tap to the beat in a rhythm minigame. By tapping more accurately, your Beature's strength will grow!

Collect & Train Musical Beatures

Build your team of Beatures, each inspired by different instruments and sounds. Level them up, equip new songs, and customize your team to suit your strategy.

Plant & Harvest crops for Cooking

Farm crops in the Rhythm Ranch and cook them into meals for your Beatures to eat! Dishes will heal Beatures and can apply special buffs.
3294110.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
